message:
🐛 Fix cluster creation bypassing demo mode when kc-agent is connected (#1299)

When kc-agent is connected, local cluster operations (create, delete,
list, detect tools) now use the real backend instead of returning
simulated demo data. Demo simulation only activates when both demo
mode is on AND the agent is disconnected.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
